description: This email template is a perfect fit for businesses in the Software and Technology sector, especially those dealing with cryptocurrency. It's designed to welcome new users to your crypto-centric app, guiding them on how to earn money through your platform. The design features a vault symbol, symbolizing the safety of their investment. The color scheme is a mix of green, grey, and yellow, giving it a modern and tech-oriented feel. The 'Crypto Onboarding' template is also classified under the Notification category, making it ideal for sending updates or alerts to your users. This template is an excellent tactic for enhancing user experience and engagement.
short_description: Immerse in the cryptocurrency world with our vibrant onboarding email design. Combining green, grey, and yellow, it symbolizes financial growth and crypto security. Perfect for app users to learn earning money through crypto trading. Experience a user-friendly interface in the Software and Technology and Notification sectors.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
